name: Turkey Meat Loaf Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix all ingredients except cauliflower and broccoli.
3. Turn the mixture into a greased ring pan or 9x5 loaf pan coated with non-stick spray.
4. Bake for 50-60 minutes. Let stand 15 minutes before unmolding.
5. Unmold meatloaf onto serving platter and garnish with steamed cauliflower and broccoli.
